allow: PowerShell($env:Path = [System.Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariable\("Path","Machine"\) + ";" + [System.Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariable\("Path","User"\); gcc --version 2>&1 | Select-Object -First 2; Write-Output "---"; mingw32-make --version 2>&1 | Select-Object -First 1)

PowerShell($total = 0; @\('src\\main.c','src\\perfis.c','src\\prova.c','src\\utils.c','include\\perfis.h','include\\prova.h','include\\utils.h'\) | ForEach-Object { $n = \(Get-Content $_\).Count; Write-Output "$_ : $n linhas"; $total += $n }; Write-Output "------"; Write-Output "TOTAL: $total linhas")

PowerShell(cd "C:\\Users\\Fernando\\Documents\\GitHub\\adapta-provas"; $proc = Start-Process powershell.exe -ArgumentList "-NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File `"$PWD\\setup.ps1`"" -Wait -PassThru -NoNewWindow; Write-Output "Exit code: $\($proc.ExitCode\)")
